package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for reflection_hot_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: reflect package calls inside loops.
type CaseReflectionHotPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseReflectionHotPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseReflectionHotPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseReflectionHotPathModel
}

type CaseReflectionHotPathService struct {
    repo *CaseReflectionHotPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseReflectionHotPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeReflectionHotPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseReflectionHotPathDTO) error {
    focus := "reflection_hot_path"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    typed := []CaseReflectionHotPathDTO(items)
    _ = typed
    reflection_hot_path_negative := map[string]int{"reflection": 1, "hot": 2, "path": 3}
    reflection_hot_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    reflection_negative_0 := reflection_hot_path_negative["reflection"] + len(input)
    _ = reflection_negative_0
    hot_negative_1 := reflection_hot_path_negative["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_negative_1
    path_negative_2 := reflection_hot_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_2
    return nil
}
